description_long: This induction cooker features a modern, boxy design with a brushed stainless steel front panel and a large, rectangular oven door with a wide black glass window. The control panel is located at the top front, housing two round knobs on the right and a digital display on the left, which shows the time in blue digits. The door is equipped with a sturdy horizontal handle, and a brand logo is centered below the window. The sides and top are finished in a matte, dark metallic color, while the back is plain and unadorned. The overall construction suggests a robust appliance suitable for built-in kitchen installations, with a smooth, hard exterior and minimal decorative elements. The cooker appears to be designed for both functionality and durability, with clear, accessible controls and a spacious oven compartment.
description: A modern induction cooker with a stainless steel front, digital display, two control knobs, and a large glass oven door with a handle and brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stainless steel panel, digital display, two knobs, large oven door with glass window, handle, and brand logo.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, matte metallic side panel and the depth of the appliance.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat, dark metallic back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain, matte metallic surface and a glimpse of the control knobs.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front, featuring a digital display on the left and two round knobs on the right. The display is rectangular and shows blue digits, while the knobs are evenly spaced and likely control temperature and settings. There are no visible touch areas or additional buttons, and the layout is symmetrical and uncluttered.
